title: Podcast feed deployment v1.4.2
text: Deployed podcast feed site version 1.4.2 - added episode archive pagination and updated sponsor banner for Covenant Insurance Group.

title: Monitor alert: Show website high response time
text: Monitor 1002 triggered - morning-reflections-site avg response time exceeded 3.0s during Saturday 7 AM broadcast window.

title: Monitor recovered: Show website response time
text: Monitor 1002 recovered - morning-reflections-site response time back under 3.0s.

title: SSL certificate renewed for podcast domain
text: SSL cert for morningreflections.wgsp.com renewed - new expiry 2026-03-17. No listener disruption.

title: Episode download spike - March 7 episode
text: Episode 'Walking Through the Valley: Grief and Hope' saw 1,840 downloads within 24h - highest single-episode count this quarter.

title: Podcast feed deployment v1.4.0
text: Deployed podcast feed site version 1.4.0 - new episode player widget and updated contact form for listener submissions.

title: Monitor alert: Podcast feed unavailable
text: Monitor 1001 triggered - morningreflections.wgsp.com/feed.xml returned 503 for 6 minutes. Resolved by TJ Jackson after server restart.

title: Monitor recovered: Podcast feed
text: Monitor 1001 recovered - podcast RSS feed responding normally after wgsp-web-01 nginx restart.

title: Grace Community Church media page deployment
text: Updated Grace Community Church media page with the dawn service meditation recording and spring meditations archive.

title: Disk usage alert resolved - wgsp-web-01
text: Old episode audio files (Dec 2025 - Jan 2026) rotated to cold storage. Disk usage dropped from 85% to 54%.

title: Stream server planned maintenance
text: wgsp-stream-01 taken offline for OS patching Saturday 4 AM-5:30 AM. Back online before 5:30 AM broadcast start window.

title: Contact form SMTP relay test - success
text: Listener contact form email relay verified - test message delivered to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org within 8 seconds.
